applicability_notes: Unary eltwise; golden is torch.rsqrt. Supports fast_and_approximate_mode flag. Frequently appears inside RMSNorm decomposition: ttnn.rsqrt(ttnn.mean(ttnn.pow(x,2), dim=-1, keepdim=True) + eps) followed by ttnn.multiply with x and weight — the full chain `x * torch.rsqrt(x.pow(2).mean(-1, keepdim=True) + eps) * weight` is a candidate for fusion into ttnn.rms_norm.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [BATCH, 1, SEQ, 1] (last dim reduced via mean, keepdim=True)
placement_observations.source: call_site: RMSNorm decomposition — input converted via ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(inp, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before pow/mean/rsqrt chain
call_site: RMSNorm decomposition — output kept interleaved, consumed by ttnn.multiply, final output optionally re-converted via ttnn.to_memory_config(output, memory_config)
